latent_vars.mechanism: Rear-end motor vehicle collision with the left shoulder striking the driver-side door.

mechanism: Rear-end motor vehicle collision with the left shoulder striking the driver-side door.
chief_complaint: Left shoulder pain with reduced range of motion after the collision.
diagnosis: Left shoulder sprain with partial-thickness supraspinatus tearing.
imaging_impression: Partial-thickness supraspinatus tendon tear with subacromial bursitis. No acute fracture or dislocation.
objective_finding: Abduction limited to 90 degrees with 4/5 supraspinatus strength and positive Hawkins impingement testing.
disposition: Discharged home in a sling with ice, anti-inflammatory medication, and orthopedic follow-up in three days.
treatment_plan: Begin supervised physical therapy twice weekly for six weeks and restrict overhead lifting.
billing_lines: DOS 01/18/2024 | CPT/HCPCS 99284 | Revenue Code 0450 | Units 1 | Charge Amount $1,250.00 | Emergency department evaluation
DOS 01/25/2024 | CPT/HCPCS 73221 | Revenue Code 0351 | Units 1 | Charge Amount $1,480.00 | MRI shoulder without contrast
DOS 02/01/2024 | CPT/HCPCS 99213 | Revenue Code 0510 | Units 1 | Charge Amount $280.00 | Orthopedic follow-up
DOS 02/08/2024 | CPT/HCPCS 97110 | Revenue Code 0420 | Units 2 | Charge Amount $180.00 | Therapeutic exercise

template_context.chief_complaint: Left shoulder pain with reduced range of motion after the collision.
template_context.mechanism: Rear-end motor vehicle collision with the left shoulder striking the driver-side door.
template_context.medications: Medication list reviewed and updated.
template_context.treatment_plan: Begin supervised physical therapy twice weekly for six weeks and restrict overhead lifting.
template_context.follow_up_reason: Follow-up for persistent pain, mobility loss, and treatment response.
template_context.functional_limitation_text: Difficulty using the shoulder for daily tasks was reported.
template_context.plan_summary: Begin supervised physical therapy twice weekly for six weeks and restrict overhead lifting.
template_context.pt_exercise_block:
- Shoulder flexion 3 sets x 10 reps
- Resistance band rows 3 x 12
- Scapular stabilization drills 2 x 15
template_context.pt_response_text: Patient tolerated session well with mild pain at end-range motion.
template_context.attendance_comment: Attendance reviewed and home program reinforced.
template_context.diagnosis: Left shoulder sprain; rotator cuff injury suspected.
template_context.objective_finding: Tenderness over the lateral shoulder with guarded active range of motion to approximately 55 degrees.
